output.dependency: The structured identifier in column 2 appears to encode a specific flight instance (airline/flight number and route, e.g. carrier-flight-origin-destination). That flight instance determines the scheduled and actual departure/arrival times in columns 3, 4, 5, and 6.
The numeric identifier in column 0 appears to depend on the source/provider name in column 1, likely representing a source-specific record ID assigned within that provider.
